strengths: ~16 years of broad full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Founder of an open-source GIS platform, showing entrepreneurial initiative and product ownership
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML platform leadership or recognized AI expertise at the scale implied by a Principal/Director-level IC role
Title history tops out at Senior/Staff; limited evidence of director-level strategic influence or advising strategic customers
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and limited cloud-platform depth (AWS CDK mentioned, but not deep cloud architecture leadership)

key_factors.factor: AI strategy and recognized AI expertise
Breadth of engineering experience and craftsmanship

response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned, versatile software engineer with strong craftsmanship, teaching, and entrepreneurial traits via the GISCollective project, and some recent touchpoints with AI-agent tooling. However, the role targets a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and strategic advisory scope, which are not evident in the resume. Fit is partial: strong general engineering foundation, but a gap against the AI-strategy and principal-scope expectations.
